query: SELECT id, email, name, loginMethod, passwordHash IS NOT NULL as has_password, createdAt FROM users WHERE email NOT LIKE '%test-user%' AND email NOT LIKE '%@example.com' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
